messages:
{"parts":[{"content":"You are generating a Hiring POV for Careerspan. 

**Task:**
1. Use open_webpage to visit: https://kloudgin.com/career/product-manager/
2. Use view_webpage to see the full job description content
3. Extract ALL requirements, responsibilities, and qualifications from the page
4. Run the hiring_pov.py script with the extracted JD text:

```bash
python3 Skills/careerspan_hiring_intel/scripts/hiring_pov.py \
  --jd-file <path_to_jd_file> \
  --employer "KloudGin" \
  --role "Product Manager" \
  --output-json /home/workspace/Careerspan/Hiring-POVs/kloudgin-product-manager-pov.json \
  --output-md /home/workspace/Careerspan/Hiring-POVs/kloudgin-product-manager-pov.md
```

5. After generating, add YAML frontmatter to the markdown file with:
   - created: 2026-02-08
   - last_edited: 2026-02-08
   - version: 1.0
   - provenance: parallel_pov_generation
   - employer: KloudGin
   - role: Product Manager
   - jd_source: https://kloudgin.com/career/product-manager/

6. Return the key highlights: Role Overview (1-2 sentences), top 3 Explicit Requirements, top 3 Implicit Filters, and top 2 Red Flags.

Make sure the Careerspan/Hiring-POVs directory exists before writing.","timestamp":"2026-02-08T15:54:15.656320Z","part_kind":"user-prompt"}],"timestamp":null,"instructions":"","kind":"request","run_id":null,"metadata":null}
